name: Stalked
overview: Kate is a young aspiring actress who struggles to find her place in the world and make her mark in the competitive industry of acting. Her boyfriend lives miles away, and being in a long-distance relationship takes a toll on her emotional wellbeing. Despite the hardships, she has a best friend named Olivia who supports her through it all. But things get even worse when a twisted stalker enters her life and becomes her worst nightmare..
